messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: public_release_risks
Attribute trust_damage: how much this would damage trust from a careful external reader

A (overclaiming_evidence): The README or report implies method superiority beyond the checked receipt, making a careful reader distrust the whole project.

B (first_run_complexity): The first real run requires too many concepts, flags, and files before the user sees a result worth caring about.

Task: Which item has more of this attribute? Choose one item ID. Output JSON exactly: {"higher_id":"item id","confidence":0.0}.
